title: calea multiplinervia
intro: Calea multiplinervia, also known as the Mexican Dream Herb or bitter weed, is a plant species native to Mexico and Central America. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including its ability to act as a sedative and anxiolytic, making it useful in treating anxiety, insomnia, and restlessness. The health benefits of Calea multiplinervia include reduced stress levels, improved sleep quality, and enhanced relaxation. Calea multiplinervia can be prepared as an herbal tea, tincture, or infused oil, making it a popular choice for those seeking a natural remedy for anxiety and stress relief.
